basic_details.job_title: UCSL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant General Manager, Deputy Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant General Manager (Contract & Procurement), Assistant General Manager (Design), Manager (Hull), Deputy Manager (Marine)

age_limit.age_details: Max 50 years for AGM, 40 years for Manager, 35 years for Deputy Manager
age_limit.details: Assistant General Manager: Maximum age is 50 years. Age relaxation for SC is 5 years and for Ex-servicemen is 5 years (max age 55 years). Manager: Maximum age is 40 years. Age relaxation for Ex-servicemen is 10 years (max age 50 years). Deputy Manager: Maximum age is 35 years. Age relaxation for Ex-servicemen is 10 years (max age 45 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Mechanical or Production or Electrical or Electronics or Civil or Marine Engineering; Degree in Mechanical or Naval Architecture or Production Engineering; Minimum of three-year Diploma in Mechanical or Marine or Shipbuilding Engineering; Graduation from Directorate of Marine Engineering Training (DMET)
qualification.details: Assistant General Manager (Contract & Procurement): Degree in Mechanical or Production or Electrical or Electronics or Civil or Marine Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum of 15 years managerial experience in sub-contracting or vendor development/Purchasing/ Operations/ Managing government tenders in Shipbuilding, Ship repair, Offshore Fabrication Company or Marine related Engineering company or Marine related Government / Semi-Government Company / Establishment. Assistant General Manager (Design): Degree in Mechanical or Naval Architecture or Production Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum of 15 years managerial experience in Hull structure Design or, Machinery outfit Design or Hull outfit design of ships in Shipbuilding, Ship repair, Offshore Fabrication Company or Marine related Engineering company or Marine related Government / Semi-Government Company / Establishment. Manager (Hull): Degree in Mechanical or Naval Architecture or Production Engineering from a recognized University OR Minimum of three-year Diploma in Mechanical or Marine or Shipbuilding Engineering from a State Board of Technical Education. For Degree holders: Minimum of 9 years managerial experience. For Diploma holders: Minimum of 12 years managerial experience. Experience in the areas of Hull, Outfitting, Heavy Fabrication, Erection functions in Shipbuilding, Ship repair, Offshore Fabrication Company or Marine related Engineering company or Marine related Government / Semi-Government Company / Establishment. Deputy Manager (Marine): Degree in Mechanical or Marine Engineering from a recognized University OR Graduation from Directorate of Marine Engineering Training (DMET) with a minimum of 3rd engineer certification of competency. Minimum of 5 years sailing experience. As marine Engineer onboard oceangoing ships at least two years as third engineer.

selection_process: PowerPoint Presentation (40 marks) Work Experience (30 marks) Group Discussion (10 marks) Personal Interview (20 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UCSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for UCSL Recruitment 2026 is 16 July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various executive posts in Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) for the recruitment year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant General Manager posts?
faq.answer: For Assistant General Manager posts, candidates need a Degree in Mechanical or Production or Electrical or Electronics or Civil or Marine Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Deputy Manager (Marine) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Manager (Marine) post is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for certain categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: General category candidates are required to pay an application fee of ₹ 1,000/- (Non-refundable, plus bank charges extra) for the UCSL recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC candidates for Assistant General Manager posts, which is 5 years. Specific details for other categories are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a PowerPoint Presentation, assessment of Work Experience, Group Discussion, and a Personal Interview. Marks are allocated for each stage.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the E5 grade post?
faq.answer: For the E5 grade, the basic pay starts at ₹80,000, with total emoluments reaching approximately ₹1,59,280 per month, including DA, HRA, and other allowances.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with a Diploma apply for the Manager (Hull) post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a minimum of a three-year Diploma in Mechanical or Marine or Shipbuilding Engineering are eligible for the Manager (Hull) post, provided they meet the experience criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official UCSL website.
